project.name: Cat
project.summary: Cat is a production JavaScript/TypeScript logging and observability package monorepo with core logger and companion transport, tracing, redaction, and sampling packages.
goals: Own the Cat package APIs, TypeScript types, runtime implementations, documentation, tests, and package release workflow.
Keep logging, redaction, tracing, OTLP, sampling, and transport behavior stable and explicitly versioned.
Publish packages only through the documented release workflow with CI and npm readback evidence.
nonGoals: Own downstream applications' observability policy, retention policy, vendor backends, or compliance decisions.
Encode customer-specific logging behavior into the package core.
Treat source revert as complete recovery after npm packages are published.

owns.name: logger-package-ecosystem
owns.description: The @sylphx/cat core logger and companion package APIs, TypeScript types, runtime implementations, tests, and docs.

owns.name: observability-extensions
owns.description: Pretty formatting, file/http transports, OTLP export, W3C trace context, redaction, and tail-sampling behavior.

doesNotOwn: Downstream applications' observability policy, retention policy, vendor backends, or compliance decisions.
Customer-specific logging behavior outside documented package APIs.
Enterprise doctrine or org-wide release/ruleset ownership.
forbiddenCouplings: Do not add application-specific logging behavior to package core without a documented option or plugin API.
Do not publish packages without release intent, required CI, and npm readback proof.
Do not rely on source revert for already-published npm versions.

delivery.deployPath: Release workflow delegates to SylphxAI/.github reusable release workflow with inherited secrets.
delivery.productionProof: Required CI context, Changesets/version evidence, npm package readback for every released package, and documentation build evidence.

packageRelease.releaseIntent: Changesets capture package release intent and the release workflow publishes changed packages.
packageRelease.versionPr: Version PR and package changelog updates are produced by the central reusable release workflow.
packageRelease.publisher: SylphxAI/.github reusable release workflow with inherited repository secrets.
packageRelease.publishProof: npm package readback for @sylphx/cat and companion packages plus changelog/version evidence.

gaps.description: CI is repo-local legacy GitHub Actions; migrate to central admission or stable status fan-in when the fleet workflow is ready.
Make package publish readback and documentation publish proof first-class release evidence in the reusable workflow output.
